ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the lead author of the study */,
  "year_of_publication" INTEGER /* Year the study was published */,
  "study_location" TEXT /* Location where the study was conducted */,
  "study_cohorts" TEXT /* Cohorts involved in the study */,
  "RCT_or_not" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the study is a randomized controlled trial (RCT) or not */,
  "N_treated" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the treatment group */,
  "N_control" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the control group */,
  "treatment_initiation_time" TEXT /* Time of treatment initiation relative to infection */,
  "treatment_regimen" TEXT /* Treatment regimen used in the study */,
  "treatment_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the treatment */,
  "follow_up_time" TEXT /* Follow-up time after treatment */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Current status of the study */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study */,
  "study_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "study_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Total sample size of the study */,
  "primary_outcome" TEXT /* Primary outcome measured in the study */,
  "secondary_outcomes" TEXT /* Secondary outcomes measured in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_treatment_regimen FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_regimen") REFERENCES treatment_regimens ("regimen_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_study_location FOREIGN KEY ("study_location") REFERENCES study_locations ("location_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Researcher's affiliation */,
  "role" TEXT /* Researcher's role in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_researchers" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the studies table */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the researchers table */,
  "role" TEXT /* Researcher's role in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_regimens" (
  "regimen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment regimen */,
  "regimen_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment regimen */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment regimen */,
  "drug_names" TEXT /* Names of the specific drugs used in the treatment regimen */,
  "dosage_instructions" TEXT /* Dosage instructions for each drug in the regimen */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Known side effects associated with each treatment regimen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the study was conducted */,
  "cohorts" TEXT /* Cohorts involved in the study */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the study location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographical latitude of the study location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographical longitude of the study location */,
  "site_principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator at the study site */,
  "site_contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information for the study site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* User's role in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Specific permission assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission")
)
